DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF MICHELLE FULLER'S MOTION TO REOPEN DISCOVERY PURSUANT TO CCP 2024.050(A) DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO REOPEN DISCOVERY IS DENIED. THE COURT'S ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFF LEAVE TO AMEND HER COMPLAINT EXPLICITLY STATED THAT PLAINTIFF MAY AMEND HER COMPLAINT "ALLEGING ANY STATUTORY CAUSE OF ACTION BASED ON THE SAME FACTS." PLAINTIFF AMENDED HER COMPLAINT BASED ON THE SAME FACTS PREVIOUSLY ALLEGED. PLAINTIFF TOOK WRITTEN DISCOVERY AND DEPOSITIONS WHILE DISCOVERY WAS OPEN, AND THERE IS NO GOOD CAUSE SHOWN FOR WHY PLAINTIFF NEEDS ADDITIONAL DISCOVERY TO PREPARE FOR TRIAL. THE PARTIES' REQUESTS FOR SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CONOR MOORE; CLERK: WILLIAM TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Reopen Discovery Pursuant To Ccp 2024.050(A); Memorandum Of Points And Authorities.
Off Calendar Nov-09-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Terry B. Bates Esq., ReedSmith LLP, Telephone (213) 457- 8012, apearing for defendant Deutsche Bank National Trust Company;
No other appearance.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MICHELLE FULLER'S Motion To Reopen Discovery Pursuant To Ccp 2024.050(A)

Defendant's Request for Judicial Notice is Granted. Plaintiff's motion to reopen discovery is Denied. The Court's order granting Plaintiff leave to amend her complaint explicitly stated that Plaintiff may amend her complaint "alleging any statutory cause of action based on the same facts." Plaintiff amended her complaint based on the same facts previously alleged. Plaintiff took written discovery and depositions while discovery was open, and there is no good cause shown for why Plaintiff needs additional discovery to prepare for trial. The parties' requests for sanctions are Denied.

Order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Conor Moore; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)
